nasb.text: But when they came to the threshing floor of Nacon, Uzzah reached out toward the ark of God and took hold of it, for the oxen nearly upset it.

esv.text: And when they came to the threshing floor of Nacon, Uzzah put out his hand to the ark of God and took hold of it, for the oxen stumbled.

cnv.text: 他們到了拿艮的打禾場的時候，因為牛幾乎絆倒，烏撒就伸手扶住　神的約櫃。

ccb.text: 他们走到拿肯的麦场时，拉车的牛失蹄，乌撒便伸手去扶上帝的约柜。
